title: carex triquetra
intro: Carex triquetra, also known as the Triangular Sedge, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex triquetra are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Carex triquetra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its dried roots and leaves can also be used in traditional medicine.
